page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BIOE486 or ENBE486.

Formerly: ENBE486.

BIOE488 Research Methods in Bioengineering (1-3 Credits)

Exploring a variety of research methods in the field of Bioengineering. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Fischell Department of Bioengineering department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
